title: Design On Time || Episode 04
excerpt: Happy Tuesday everyone. We had our first food related challenge this week on Design On Time , care of food blogger and author Landria Voigt. What we learned, among other things, is that sweet potatoes make mighty fine stamps, and…
body:
Happy Tuesday everyone.  We had our first food related challenge this week on  Design On Time, care of food blogger and author Landria Voigt.  What we learned, among other things, is that sweet potatoes make mighty fine stamps, and that you most definitely do not want to eat them raw!  See what we made by clicking here, or on the image below.

Here's what the layouts ended up looking like. We both loved using the Messy Box by A Beautiful Mess! I think Jamie's layout turned out way better than mine. I didn't have time to even do any journaling.
